title: aneilema collinum
intro: Aneilema collinum, also known as the small-flowered Aneilema or small-flowered Eulophia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Aneilema collinum include its potential use in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. In traditional medicine, the plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion by boiling the roots and leaves in water, or as a powder by drying and grinding the plant material.
